text.title: AI-Enabled Business Analysis Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to produce a AI-Enabled Business Analysis artefact from typed inputs.

step.name: gather
step.action: Confirm every prerequisite is present and recent. Refuse to proceed if any are missing.
step.output: inputs.json with typed entries for each prerequisite
step.decision-gate: Any prerequisite missing - exit with reason; do not synthesize.

step.name: analyse
step.action: Parse + classify each input against the core rules. Tag known vs unknown values. Compute any derived metric the contract requires.

step.name: draft
step.action: Compose draft decision + rationale referencing at least one input by name. Apply allowed-transformations from 02-output-contract.xml.

step.name: self-check
step.action: Run the self-check checklist from 02-output-contract.xml. Match against forbidden patterns and the failure modes in 03-failure-modes.xml. If any hit, fix and re-check.
step.decision-gate: If any forbidden pattern still matches after one fix attempt - escalate to human.

step.name: emit
step.action: Set artefact_id with prefix `aiba-`, version=1.0.0 (or bump if updating an existing record), last_reviewed=today. Validate against templates/ai-enabled-business-analysis.json. Emit.
step.output: final artefact + status flag for owner review

list.item: Named owner has acknowledged the artefact
